lyric_text:
Met you by sur prise

I did n't re a lize

that my life would change for ev er

The on ly kind of real fan ta sy

Al though it's on ly fan ta sy

 seems all right

That' my love would change for ev er 

Tell me that it's true, feel ing that are new
